name: RAG Chatbot
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot built for my MSc thesis. Answers real-time queries by retrieving relevant context from a document store before generating responses.

name: Data Pipeline – Snowflake
description: Automated ETL pipeline ingesting raw CSV data from S3 into Snowflake with transformation layers, scheduling via Airflow, and Power BI dashboard output.

name: Weather Dashboard
description: Interactive weather application using OpenWeather API with location-based forecasts, charts, and severe weather alerts.

name: Portfolio Website
description: This responsive portfolio with glassmorphism design, dark/light mode, animated carousel, and a RAG-powered chat widget.
